objective: Split monolithic curriculum files into individual lesson files while maintaining export structure

current_state.structure: 5 large files (class8.js through class12.js) each containing all lessons in a single export

target_state.structure: Modular folder structure with individual lesson files + index.js per class

lessons_summary.title: Bài 2: Xà phòng và chất giặt rửa
Bài 4: Giới thiệu về carbohydrate. Glucose và fructose

class12.file_structure: 9 individual lesson files (lesson-1.js through lesson-9.js) + index.js

file_pattern_per_lesson.description: Each lesson file will contain a single lesson object exported as default

index_file_pattern.description: Index file that re-exports all lessons in original structure

migration_strategy.step_1: Read entire content of class8.js, class9.js, class10.js, class11.js, class12.js
migration_strategy.step_2: Create folder structures: src/data/curriculum/class8/ through class12/
migration_strategy.step_3: For each lesson in each class, create lesson-N.js file with single lesson object
migration_strategy.step_4: Create index.js in each class folder that imports all lessons and re-exports in original format
migration_strategy.step_5: Verify that app imports continue to work (may need to update import paths)
migration_strategy.step_6: Delete or archive original monolithic files

benefits.maintainability: Easier to find and modify specific lessons
benefits.development: Team can work on different lessons simultaneously without conflict
benefits.testing: Individual lesson files can be tested independently
benefits.code_organization: Clearer file structure follows single responsibility principle
benefits.scalability: Easy to add new lessons by creating new lesson-N.js files

import_path_changes_required.note: If using barrel exports, path remains the same but structure changes internally

execution_notes.note_1: Ensure no curriculum data is modified during migration - only structure changes
execution_notes.note_2: All original properties, arrays, and objects must be preserved exactly
execution_notes.note_3: Each lesson-N.js file is independently functional but designed to be imported by index.js
execution_notes.note_4: The index.js acts as an adapter maintaining backward compatibility
execution_notes.note_5: Consider keeping original monolithic files as backup until migration is fully tested
